metadata.title:
new SHOPS AND DEPOT


PLANNED FOR HILLYARD

pages.raw_text:
Immediate improvements aggregat-
Ing hundreds of thousands of dollars
will be undertaken by the Great
Northern railway system at Hillyard
and IN the vicinity of Spokane. Such
is the announcement of General Man
ager Ward today during his half hour
stop in Spokane.


what will be the amount eXpend-
ed?" was asked.


We'll" said Mr.. Ward. that is de-
cidedly hard to say"


will the Hillyard improvements
amount to $25o,O0O?"


II expect so. although of course it
Is only an estimate. New shops will
need to be put up, additional track
laid and a different depot will be
needed The policy of the system
this year Is to expend as little money
as possible in making improvement
and only where absolutely necessary.
Hillyard. owing to the amount of bus
mess there, needs additional facilities.
